videos.headline: Texas clobbers Oklahoma to win the Red River Rivalry
videos.description: Texas uses a huge second quarter to dominate Oklahoma 34-3 as they remain undefeated.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Texas clobbers Oklahoma to win the Red River Rivalry) 2024/10/12 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Ewers throws pick on first possession
videos.description: Quinn Ewers overthrows his receiver and it's picked off by Oklahoma's Billy Bowman Jr.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ewers throws pick on first possession) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers finds Gunnar Helm for 7-yard TD
videos.description: Texas gets on the board as Quinn Ewers throws it to Gunnar Helm, who breaks a couple of tackles and gets into end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers finds Gunnar Helm for 7-yard TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas recovers own fumble in end zone for TD
videos.description: Texas running back Quintrevion Wisner fumbles the ball into the end zone and it's recovered by receiver Silas Bolden for a Longhorns' touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas recovers own fumble in end zone for TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas forces a turnover after knocking ball loose from QB
videos.description: Texas' Anthony Hill Jr. rips the ball away from quarterback Michael Hawkins Jr. and it's recovered by Vernon Broughton for a turnover.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas forces a turnover after knocking ball loose from QB) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quintrevion Wisner goes 43 yards for a Texas TD
videos.description: Texas goes up 21-3 as Quintrevion Wisner takes it 43 yards to the house.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quintrevion Wisner goes 43 yards for a Texas TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas forces second fumble in as many possessions
videos.description: Oklahoma turns it over again with under two minutes remaining in first half with a fumble.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas forces second fumble in as many possessions) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunnar Helm makes spectacular catch on the trick play
videos.description: Texas gets near the goal line as Gunnar Helm goes up and makes the stellar catch on the trick play.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunnar Helm makes spectacular catch on the trick play) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers keeps it himself for TD run
videos.description: Quinn Ewers scores the 1-yard touchdown to put Texas up 34-3.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers keeps it himself for TD run) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas plants flag at midfield over Baker Mayfield jersey
videos.description: Texas plants its flag at midfield on top of a Baker Mayfield jersey, a reference to Mayfield planting the flag years ago.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas plants flag at midfield over Baker Mayfield jersey) 2024/10/12 ESHEET
